description: Increased call drop rate during evening commute hours. Many UEs reporting brief outages and abnormal handover patterns. Speeds in affected cluster are typical commute speeds (3-5 m/s).
symptoms: Spike in handover failures during 17:00-19:00 window. Affected UEs show speed 3-5 m/s and 3-5 serving cell changes per minute. SINR volatility high but mean adequate.
